reviews.comment:
Dos playeros en el comienzo de un fin de semana largo, o sea dos horas para cargar combustible y encima en el servi compras no hay prioridad para mujeres embarazadas.

(Translated by Google)
Two gas stations at the start of a long weekend, meaning two hours to refuel, and on top of that, there is no priority for pregnant women at the convenience store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1NktucWZREAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio en Chepes. Los que viajamos desde San Juan hacía Córdoba es un lugar obligado para parar a cargar nafta, tomar un cafecito, utilizar el baño y continuar viaje.  A veces la encontré con falta de aseo en los sanitarios y los precios de los productos demasiado elevados.

(Translated by Google)
Gas station in Chepes. For those traveling from San Juan to Córdoba, this is a must-stop for gas, a coffee, a restroom, and a ride onward. I sometimes found the restrooms unclean and the prices excessive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtc0lfYi1nRRAB

reviews.comment:

No es de las mejores estaciones del ACA, a la noche los baños están cerrado y los del costados no son de lo mejor.

(Translated by Google)
It's not one of the best ACA stations; the bathrooms are closed at night and the ones on the sides aren't the best.

reviews.comment:
Muy lerdos  ya me hiba...no salia nadie atender  .. aunque toque bocina y todo ..eran las 13 hs..   tenían restringida la nafta   solo 4000 pesos me cargaban  ....

(Translated by Google)
They were so slow, I was about to leave...nobody came out to help me...even though I honked the horn and everything...it was 1 PM...they had restricted the gas, they would only give me 4000 pesos worth...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1a3FLUnJ3RRAB
